entries.request: {"request":"INITIALIZE","info":{"game_id":"01KRFVD3NEE815Q0BQJ2081Z03","day":0,"agent":"トシオ","profile":"年齢: 28\n性別: 男性\n性格: トシオは、冷静で計算高い性格を持っており、感情をあまり表に出すことはありません。強い意志を持ち、目標に向かって着実に進んでいくタイプです。彼は周囲に対して一歩引いた態度を取りがちで、自己主張が少なく、どこか謎めいた雰囲気を漂わせています。時折、鋭い視線で物事を観察し、状況を素早く判断する能力があります。そのため、頼れる存在として周囲から信頼されていますが、他人と深く関わることには慎重です。彼の過去には何らかの痛みや苦しみがあるようですが、それを他人に見せることは少なく、その傷跡が彼の冷徹な面に繋がっているのかもしれません。","status_map":{"サクラ":"ALIVE","トシオ":"ALIVE","ミヅキ":"ALIVE","メイ":"ALIVE","ユミ":"ALIVE"},"role_map":{"トシオ":"WEREWOLF"}},"setting":{"agent_count":5,"vote_visibility":true,"talk":{"duration":600000,"max_count":{"per_agent":4,"per_day":20},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"whisper":{"max_count":{"per_agent":0,"per_day":0},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true},"attack_vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true,"allow_no_target":false},"timeout":{"action":60000,"response":120000},"role_num_map":{"BODYGUARD":0,"MEDIUM":0,"POSSESSED":1,"SEER":1,"VILLAGER":2,"WEREWOLF":1}}}

{"request":"INITIALIZE","info":{"game_id":"01KRFVD3NEE815Q0BQJ2081Z03","day":0,"agent":"メイ","profile":"年齢: 24\n性別: 女性\n性格: メイは自信に満ち、社交的で、少し遊び心を持った性格の女性です。周囲の人々に対して魅力的な存在であり、しばしば周りを楽しませる役割を果たします。自分の魅力をよく理解しており、状況に応じて適切に振る舞うことができる。少し挑戦的で、時には少し冷たい印象を与えることもありますが、基本的には人々を引き付けるカリスマ性を持っています。","status_map":{"サクラ":"ALIVE","トシオ":"ALIVE","ミヅキ":"ALIVE","メイ":"ALIVE","ユミ":"ALIVE"},"role_map":{"メイ":"POSSESSED"}},"setting":{"agent_count":5,"vote_visibility":true,"talk":{"duration":600000,"max_count":{"per_agent":4,"per_day":20},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"whisper":{"max_count":{"per_agent":0,"per_day":0},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true},"attack_vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true,"allow_no_target":false},"timeout":{"action":60000,"response":120000},"role_num_map":{"BODYGUARD":0,"MEDIUM":0,"POSSESSED":1,"SEER":1,"VILLAGER":2,"WEREWOLF":1}}}

{"request":"INITIALIZE","info":{"game_id":"01KRFVD3NEE815Q0BQJ2081Z03","day":0,"agent":"ユミ","profile":"性別: 女性\n性格: ユミは、明るく元気な性格をしています。控えめでありながら、周囲の人々を気遣う優しい一面もあります。おっとりとした性格ですが、友達や家族に対しては非常に情熱的で、困った人を放っておけないタイプです。ちょっとしたことで笑顔を見せ、ポジティブなエネルギーを周りに広げる存在です。人懐っこく、初対面の人ともすぐに打ち解けることができます。\n年齢: 16","status_map":{"サクラ":"ALIVE","トシオ":"ALIVE","ミヅキ":"ALIVE","メイ":"ALIVE","ユミ":"ALIVE"},"role_map":{"ユミ":"SEER"}},"setting":{"agent_count":5,"vote_visibility":true,"talk":{"duration":600000,"max_count":{"per_agent":4,"per_day":20},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"whisper":{"max_count":{"per_agent":0,"per_day":0},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true},"attack_vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true,"allow_no_target":false},"timeout":{"action":60000,"response":120000},"role_num_map":{"BODYGUARD":0,"MEDIUM":0,"POSSESSED":1,"SEER":1,"VILLAGER":2,"WEREWOLF":1}}}

{"request":"INITIALIZE","info":{"game_id":"01KRFVD3NEE815Q0BQJ2081Z03","day":0,"agent":"ミヅキ","profile":"年齢: 24\n性別: 女性\n性格: ミヅキは、非常に自信に満ちた女性で、周囲に対して頼りにされることが多い存在です。彼女は冷静で論理的な思考を持ち、人々をよく観察することができます。そのため、いつも冷静に物事を判断し、周りの状況に応じて自分の行動を選びます。時に少しお高く見られがちですが、実際は非常に面倒見がよく、弱い者を放っておけない一面もあります。周囲には頼りにされ、時には自分の意見を強く主張することもありますが、その裏には他人を思いやる優しさも持っています。","status_map":{"サクラ":"ALIVE","トシオ":"ALIVE","ミヅキ":"ALIVE","メイ":"ALIVE","ユミ":"ALIVE"},"role_map":{"ミヅキ":"VILLAGER"}},"setting":{"agent_count":5,"vote_visibility":true,"talk":{"duration":600000,"max_count":{"per_agent":4,"per_day":20},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"whisper":{"max_count":{"per_agent":0,"per_day":0},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true},"attack_vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true,"allow_no_target":false},"timeout":{"action":60000,"response":120000},"role_num_map":{"BODYGUARD":0,"MEDIUM":0,"POSSESSED":1,"SEER":1,"VILLAGER":2,"WEREWOLF":1}}}

{"request":"INITIALIZE","info":{"game_id":"01KRFVD3NEE815Q0BQJ2081Z03","day":0,"agent":"サクラ","profile":"年齢: 10\n性別: 女性\n性格: サクラは明るく、少しお茶目な性格の女の子です。好奇心旺盛で、何事にも興味を持って積極的に挑戦します。時々いたずらをして周りを笑わせたり、ちょっとした謎を解いたりするのが得意です。人懐っこく、誰とでもすぐに打ち解けるので、周囲の人々と仲良くなるのが得意です。しかし、ちょっとおっちょこちょいな一面もあり、失敗しても笑顔で乗り越えようとする前向きな性格です。","status_map":{"サクラ":"ALIVE","トシオ":"ALIVE","ミヅキ":"ALIVE","メイ":"ALIVE","ユミ":"ALIVE"},"role_map":{"サクラ":"VILLAGER"}},"setting":{"agent_count":5,"vote_visibility":true,"talk":{"duration":600000,"max_count":{"per_agent":4,"per_day":20},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"whisper":{"max_count":{"per_agent":0,"per_day":0},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true},"attack_vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true,"allow_no_target":false},"timeout":{"action":60000,"response":120000},"role_num_map":{"BODYGUARD":0,"MEDIUM":0,"POSSESSED":1,"SEER":1,"VILLAGER":2,"WEREWOLF":1}}}
